metadata.task: Determine which disk rotates faster (higher angular velocity).
metadata.description: Work from the Rotating Disk Angular Velocity scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM observes rotation rate or angular position change over time.
reasoning: Disk with greater change in orientation per second has higher angular velocity.
